TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rahaw, title = Rahaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rahaw} }

S.FORM: alang Rahaw (Takan) ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 202 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. qalang Rahaw ga nyux maki squ puyu na Piyasan nyux qesan na llyung ka sazing 'bnux rhiyal, musa 400 meta kinwagiq nya ka umi rhiyal qaniy. sinllwan lalu qalang sinllwan tayal raral ga Rahaw ini g地名由來a Takan son nha,Rahaw imi nya ga nyux mrahaw qu rhiyal qaniy. Takan imi nya ga wahan mtzyuwaw na tayal ga syan mha tatak, k'lwan nha mwah mtzyuwaw. mwah qu Gipun lga Kekoray san nya smlalu la.baha hmswa skahul Piyasan mr'ra mita ga, nanak llyung wal rmaw sa syaw rhiyal Rhaw mkura te kyahu, ini ktay qu tunux llyung kahul te inu. pinqzyuwan pinqzyuwan qalang babaw na kuhul Pinsbkan mwah mhkangi qnxan tayal lga,musa sazing ciwal kbhul kawas kwayal, aring Kobu mprkyas mwah tehuk Nagan tmqalang kya qu ruma tayal,qalang Nagan qasa ga nyux maki squ te kraya na Rahaw qaniy.mwah qu Gipun lga kiyopan nya rhiyal tayal,smyuk kwara tayal ru mciriq ana n'inu,ringan balay ga mciriq beh hbun Bngciq,babaw nya lga mwah Piyasa pincriqan 'bu Blhuy la,syun nya qongu 'bu blhuy,ini rangaw mkura Rahaw ka lingay qalang Kexuy ka Thukak mu'qongu qu Gipun, nway hmwah smyuk qu tayal mgaw.pucing nya msbalay lru, Gipun qu mlahang la. khangan Gipun kwara rhiyal tayal lga,1923 kasaw kahul Sqiy "minnaki hbun Bngciq"mkayal ka Gipun, 33 ngasal naras ni Tanga Watan mwah smhzi maki beh yahu 'bnux qalang Rahaw. slaq misuw qaniy ga kimnalay trang kinhangan na Gipun. tayal ka nyux qalang Rahaw misuw qaniy musa mzimal msyaw ngasal ru sazing kbhul msyaw hi,yaqu mmrkyas ga pyux wal mkura hogan mtzyuwaw mkangi qnxun ru ksyuw ngasal kya,nyux maki qalang ga giway bbnkis ru kya qu nyux msyobay na wahan tbasaw okyak ini ga mtzyuwaw na mqumah smpila.tehuk hngawan ryax lga kahul hogan mwah rgyax mita ggluw ru mwah Rehay kruma yaqu cyux mtzyuwaw hogan hiya. snhyan Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo qqyanux maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzwi tbasaw na okyak;wahan plbit wahan mhngaw m'abi tbaziy nniqun ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat niqun nanak, ungat iyal qu mbaziy pinbahu hiya. Tuqiy powah tuqiy osa Girang Ray 7 Seng mzyup Piyasan,hnasun Kinyupan lga mkura tuqiy 118(Ruma Seng) zimagal Kori lga tehuk qalang Rahaw.ini ga aring Sincik Kansay mkura Cinsan M'utu mluw 118(Ruma Seng)mzyup qes Piyasan, hnasunqu qalang Qoyaw Thokak Kexuy ru tehuk qalang Rahaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas wahan tbasaw mzwi 1.hongu giqas;pngya llyung 'mubuy Piyasan ka qalang Rahaw na hongu.2018 kawas suqun kbalay, qaniy ga aring kinhangan Gipun tehuk suni ga te ciwal sinnagan kmnalay hongu mslubay la,blaq balay wahan gmzwi mita na okyak uziy,330 meta kinqruyux nya, trang nasa ga hminas qruyux na hongu maki ita Taywan. 2.tuqiy raral; trang kinhangan Gipun knalay tuqiy, si gluw hinluyan tuqiy qsya tehuk qalang Kexuy.misuw qaniy lga nyux kblayun wahan mkani na okyak, ana spowah kyahu ini ga kraya mzyup,si raw syaw sin'utan qsya ru mzyup ska ruma mkaraw mbiyaq lingay qalang Rahaw. 3.giqas hongu ka llingay nyux tbaziy nniqun ru mqbaq cinringan tayal ka mung pinqzyuwaw qalang raral. blaq balay wahan tbasaw m'abi ka balaq balay wahan plbit na okyak.

alang Rahaw (Takan) ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 60 buwan, 217 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 202 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. qalang Rahaw ga nyux maki squ puyu na Piyasan nyux qesan na llyung ka sazing 'bnux rhiyal, musa 400 meta kinwagiq nya ka umi rhiyal qaniy. sinllwan lalu qalang sinllwan tayal raral ga Rahaw ini g地名由來a Takan son nha,Rahaw imi nya ga nyux mrahaw qu rhiyal qaniy. Takan imi nya ga wahan mtzyuwaw na tayal ga syan mha tatak, k'lwan nha mwah mtzyuwaw. mwah qu Gipun lga Kekoray san nya smlalu la.baha hmswa skahul Piyasan mr'ra mita ga, nanak llyung wal rmaw sa syaw rhiyal Rhaw mkura te kyahu, ini ktay qu tunux llyung kahul te inu. pinqzyuwan pinqzyuwan qalang babaw na kuhul Pinsbkan mwah mhkangi qnxan tayal lga,musa sazing ciwal kbhul kawas kwayal, aring Kobu mprkyas mwah tehuk Nagan tmqalang kya qu ruma tayal,qalang Nagan qasa ga nyux maki squ te kraya na Rahaw qaniy.mwah qu Gipun lga kiyopan nya rhiyal tayal,smyuk kwara tayal ru mciriq ana n'inu,ringan balay ga mciriq beh hbun Bngciq,babaw nya lga mwah Piyasa pincriqan 'bu Blhuy la,syun nya qongu 'bu blhuy,ini rangaw mkura Rahaw ka lingay qalang Kexuy ka Thukak mu'qongu qu Gipun, nway hmwah smyuk qu tayal mgaw.pucing nya msbalay lru, Gipun qu mlahang la. khangan Gipun kwara rhiyal tayal lga,1923 kasaw kahul Sqiy "minnaki hbun Bngciq"mkayal ka Gipun, 33 ngasal naras ni Tanga Watan mwah smhzi maki beh yahu 'bnux qalang Rahaw. slaq misuw qaniy ga kimnalay trang kinhangan na Gipun. tayal ka nyux qalang Rahaw misuw qaniy musa mzimal msyaw ngasal ru sazing kbhul msyaw hi,yaqu mmrkyas ga pyux wal mkura hogan mtzyuwaw mkangi qnxun ru ksyuw ngasal kya,nyux maki qalang ga giway bbnkis ru kya qu nyux msyobay na wahan tbasaw okyak ini ga mtzyuwaw na mqumah smpila.tehuk hngawan ryax lga kahul hogan mwah rgyax mita ggluw ru mwah Rehay kruma yaqu cyux mtzyuwaw hogan hiya. snhyan Kirsto Kyokay ru Tensukyo qqyanux maki nyux msyobay na wahan gmzwi tbasaw na okyak;wahan plbit wahan mhngaw m'abi tbaziy nniqun ru wahan mqbaq gaga tayal ka cinringan mze'a nqu lubuw tminun cinrngan.mqumah na rramat niqun nanak, ungat iyal qu mbaziy pinbahu hiya. Tuqiy powah tuqiy osa Girang Ray 7 Seng mzyup Piyasan,hnasun Kinyupan lga mkura tuqiy 118(Ruma Seng) zimagal Kori lga tehuk qalang Rahaw.ini ga aring Sincik Kansay mkura Cinsan M'utu mluw 118(Ruma Seng)mzyup qes Piyasan, hnasunqu qalang Qoyaw Thokak Kexuy ru tehuk qalang Rahaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas wahan tbasaw mzwi 1.hongu giqas;pngya llyung 'mubuy Piyasan ka qalang Rahaw na hongu.2018 kawas suqun kbalay, qaniy ga aring kinhangan Gipun tehuk suni ga te ciwal sinnagan kmnalay hongu mslubay la,blaq balay wahan gmzwi mita na okyak uziy,330 meta kinqruyux nya, trang nasa ga hminas qruyux na hongu maki ita Taywan. 2.tuqiy raral; trang kinhangan Gipun knalay tuqiy, si gluw hinluyan tuqiy qsya tehuk qalang Kexuy.misuw qaniy lga nyux kblayun wahan mkani na okyak, ana spowah kyahu ini ga kraya mzyup,si raw syaw sin'utan qsya ru mzyup ska ruma mkaraw mbiyaq lingay qalang Rahaw. 3.giqas hongu ka llingay nyux tbaziy nniqun ru mqbaq cinringan tayal ka mung pinqzyuwaw qalang raral. blaq balay wahan tbasaw m'abi ka balaq balay wahan plbit na okyak.
S.PHON: alaŋ raħaw (takan) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. qalaŋ raħaw ɣa njux maki s~ɕqu puju na pijas~ɕan njux qes~ɕan na lljuŋ ka s~ɕaziŋ ʔβnux rħijal, mus~ɕa *** meta kinwaɣiq nja ka umi rħijal qanij. s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ s~ɕinllwan tajal raral ɣa raħaw ini ɣ****a takan s~ɕon nħa,raħaw imi nja ɣa njux mraħaw qu rħijal qanij. takan imi nja ɣa waħan mtzjuwaw na tajal ɣa s~ɕjan mħa tatak, kʔlwan nħa mwaħ mtzjuwaw. mwaħ qu ɣipun lɣa kekoraj s~ɕan nja s~ɕmlalu la.βaħa ħms~ɕwa s~ɕkaħul pijas~ɕan mrʔra mita ɣa, nanak lljuŋ wal rmaw s~ɕa s~ɕjaw rħijal rħaw mkura te kjaħu, ini ktaj qu tunux lljuŋ kaħul te inu. pinqzjuwan pinqzjuwan qalaŋ βaβaw na kuħul pins~ɕβkan mwaħ mħkaŋi qnxan tajal lɣa,mus~ɕa s~ɕaziŋ ʦ~ʨiwal kβħul kawas~ɕ kwajal, ariŋ koβu mprkjas~ɕ mwaħ teħuk naɣan tmqalaŋ kja qu ruma tajal,qalaŋ naɣan qas~ɕa ɣa njux maki s~ɕqu te kraja na raħaw qanij.mwaħ qu ɣipun lɣa kijopan nja rħijal tajal,s~ɕmjuk kwara tajal ru mʦ~ʨiriq ana nʔinu,riŋan βalaj ɣa mʦ~ʨiriq βeħ ħβun βŋʦ~ʨiq,βaβaw nja lɣa mwaħ pijas~ɕa pinʦ~ʨriqan ʔβu βlħuj la,s~ɕjun nja qoŋu ʔβu βlħuj,ini raŋaw mkura raħaw ka liŋaj qalaŋ kexuj ka tħukak muʔqoŋu qu ɣipun, nwaj ħmwaħ s~ɕmjuk qu tajal mɣaw.puʦ~ʨiŋ nja ms~ɕβalaj lru, ɣipun qu mlaħaŋ la. kħaŋan ɣipun kwara rħijal tajal lɣa,**** kas~ɕaw kaħul s~ɕqij "minnaki ħβun βŋʦ~ʨiq"mkajal ka ɣipun, ** ŋas~ɕal naras~ɕ ni taŋa watan mwaħ s~ɕmħzi maki βeħ jaħu ʔβnux qalaŋ raħaw. s~ɕlaq mis~ɕuw qanij ɣa kimnalaj traŋ kinħaŋan na ɣipun. tajal ka njux qalaŋ raħaw mis~ɕuw qanij mus~ɕa mzimal ms~ɕjaw ŋas~ɕal ru s~ɕaziŋ kβħul ms~ɕjaw ħi,jaqu mmrkjas~ɕ ɣa pjux wal mkura ħoɣan mtzjuwaw mkaŋi qnxun ru ks~ɕjuw ŋas~ɕal kja,njux maki qalaŋ ɣa ɣiwaj ββnkis~ɕ ru kja qu njux ms~ɕjoβaj na waħan tβas~ɕaw okjak ini ɣa mtzjuwaw na mqumaħ s~ɕmpila.teħuk ħŋawan rjax lɣa kaħul ħoɣan mwaħ rɣjax mita ɣɣluw ru mwaħ reħaj kruma jaqu ʦ~ʨjux mtzjuwaw ħoɣan ħija. s~ɕnħjan kirs~ɕto kjokaj ru tens~ɕukjo qqjanux maki njux ms~ɕjoβaj na waħan ɣmzwi tβas~ɕaw na okjak;waħan plβit waħan mħŋaw mʔaβi tβazij nniqun ru waħan mqβaq ɣaɣa tajal ka ʦ~ʨinriŋan mzeʔa nqu luβuw tminun ʦ~ʨinrŋan.mqumaħ na rramat niqun nanak, uŋat ijal qu mβazij pinβaħu ħija. tuqij powaħ tuqij os~ɕa ɣiraŋ raj * s~ɕeŋ mzjup pijas~ɕan,ħnas~ɕun kinjupan lɣa mkura tuqij ***(ruma s~ɕeŋ) zimaɣal kori lɣa teħuk qalaŋ raħaw.ini ɣa ariŋ s~ɕinʦ~ʨik kans~ɕaj mkura ʦ~ʨins~ɕan mʔutu mluw ***(ruma s~ɕeŋ)mzjup qes~ɕ pijas~ɕan, ħnas~ɕunqu qalaŋ qojaw tħokak kexuj ru teħuk qalaŋ raħaw. ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ waħan tβas~ɕaw mzwi *.ħoŋu ɣiqas~ɕ;pŋja lljuŋ ʔmuβuj pijas~ɕan ka qalaŋ raħaw na ħoŋu.**** kawas~ɕ s~ɕuqun kβalaj, qanij ɣa ariŋ kinħaŋan ɣipun teħuk s~ɕuni ɣa te ʦ~ʨiwal s~ɕinnaɣan kmnalaj ħoŋu ms~ɕluβaj la,βlaq βalaj waħan ɣmzwi mita na okjak uzij,*** meta kinqrujux nja, traŋ nas~ɕa ɣa ħminas~ɕ qrujux na ħoŋu maki ita tajwan. *.tuqij raral; traŋ kinħaŋan ɣipun knalaj tuqij, s~ɕi ɣluw ħinlujan tuqij qs~ɕja teħuk qalaŋ kexuj.mis~ɕuw qanij lɣa njux kβlajun waħan mkani na okjak, ana s~ɕpowaħ kjaħu ini ɣa kraja mzjup,s~ɕi raw s~ɕjaw s~ɕinʔutan qs~ɕja ru mzjup s~ɕka ruma mkaraw mβijaq liŋaj qalaŋ raħaw. *.ɣiqas~ɕ ħoŋu ka lliŋaj njux tβazij nniqun ru mqβaq ʦ~ʨinriŋan tajal ka muŋ pinqzjuwaw qalaŋ raral. βlaq βalaj waħan tβas~ɕaw mʔaβi ka βalaq βalaj waħan plβit na okjak.
